profileBuilderHint: Build your career profile with structured sections for portfolio and job matching.
profileBasicsHint: Set your public profile details and portfolio visibility settings.
skillsHint: Add your technical and soft skills.
projectsHint: Showcase projects that demonstrate your capabilities.
experienceHint: Add internships, jobs, and relevant roles.
documentsHint: Store document metadata for resume, certificates, and proof files.
profileAuthRequired: Please sign in to manage your profile.
profileValidationExperience: Company and job title are required.
profileValidationDocument: Document name and URL are required.
profileSupabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add environment variables to continue.
profileValidationUsername: Username must be 3-30 chars using lowercase letters, numbers, dot, or underscore.
profileValidationPublicUsername: Set a username before enabling public profile.
portfolioSetUsernameHint: Set a username in Profile Basics to generate a public portfolio URL.
jobsModuleHint: Post jobs, track applications, and manage follow-ups in one place.
emptyJobPosts: You have not posted any jobs yet.
coachNextStepInterview: Next step: answer one interview question and get instant feedback
coachNextStepLearning: Next step: ask for a focused learning plan for your target role
coachNextStepQuiz: Next step: generate a quiz and complete all questions
jobPostValidation: Job title, company, and description are required.
jobTrackerValidation: Role title and company are required.
jobMatchingHint: Compare your profile skills with a job description to see fit and improvement areas.
pasteJobDescription: Paste or write a full job description here...
noMatchingResult: Run matching to see score, matched skills, and gaps.
jobMatchingValidation: Please provide a job description for matching.
jobHubHint: Browse approved jobs and filter by role, location, and skills.
jobAlreadyTracked: This job is already in your tracker.
coachHint: Practice interview and viva responses with AI guidance and instant answer evaluation.
emptySessions: No sessions yet. Start by sending your first answer.
coachEmptyChat: Start practicing. Your AI coach will respond with questions and feedback.
coachInputPlaceholder: Write your interview answer or ask for the next question...
emptyEvaluation: Send a response to generate evaluation insights.
coachAiFailed: Failed to get AI response. Please try again.
coachDefaultReply: Please include more specific examples and measurable outcomes in your answer.
voiceHint: Click the microphone button to begin your AI interview. The AI will ask questions and listen to your responses automatically.
voiceUnsupported: Voice API is not supported in this browser.
voicePermissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access.
voiceTranscriptRequired: Please record or type a transcript before sending.
tasksModuleHint: Plan your preparation roadmap, manage tasks, and practice quizzes in one workspace.
emptyRoadmapWeeks: No roadmap weeks yet. Create a roadmap first.
roadmapValidation: Roadmap title and goal are required.
emptyQuiz: No quiz selected. Generate or select one to start.
notificationsHint: Track job updates, reminders, and important system alerts.
adminHint: Review moderation queues and monitor platform activities.
adminAccessDenied: You do not have admin access.
coachLearnHint: Learn career strategy for Bangladesh job categories with a normal AI assistant.
coachLearnEmptyChat: Ask anything about jobs, skills, CVs, or preparation in Bangladesh.
coachLearnInputPlaceholder: Ask a career learning question (example: How should I prepare for a junior software role in Bangladesh?)
enterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
startTypingToBegin: Start typing to begin your coaching session
technicalModeDescription: Ask technical interview questions and get expert coaching.
behavioralModeDescription: Practice answering behavioral questions with targeted feedback.
hrModeDescription: Get HR interview preparation guidance from an expert coach.
jobMatchesNoApplyLink: No apply link provided for this job
jobMatchesNoMatchesHint: Run Smart Matches or adjust filters to see curated roles tailored to you.
jobMatchesPersonalizing: Personalizing roles, skills, and seniority fit.
quizTopicOrContentRequired: Enter a topic or paste content to generate MCQs.
quizGenerationTimeout: Quiz generation is taking too long. Please try again.
quizAnswerAllRequired: Please answer all questions before submitting.
quizAdaptiveHint: Adaptive AI quiz coach that tracks weak areas, tunes difficulty, and recommends what to study next.
quizNextStep: Next step: choose a topic, set question size, and start practice
quizNoWeakTopics: No weak topics detected yet. Complete quizzes to activate adaptive targeting.
quizTopicPlaceholder: Enter subject or topic (e.g., React Hooks, Bangladesh Banking Math)
quizSourcePlaceholder: Optional: paste notes/content/chapter text here to generate MCQs from this material.
quizTip: Tip: add both topic and content for best results. If topic is empty, weak topics are auto-prioritized. Large sets (50/100) can take longer to generate.
quizPreparingAdaptive: Preparing adaptive questions based on your recent performance...
quizTopicBasedHint: Generate practice from any subject instantly
quizPasteSourceHint: Create MCQs directly from your notes/chapter text
voiceCouldNotUnderstand: I didn't understand that. Could you repeat?
jobMatchingUnableAnalyze: Unable to analyze this description right now. Please try again.
jobMatchingCharsHint: chars - minimum 20 chars needed for analysis
failedAddJobTracker: Failed to add this job to tracker.
applyUrlNotAvailable: Apply URL is not available for this job.
jobPostValidationUrl: Application URL must be a valid http(s) URL.
experienceMinInvalid: Minimum experience must be a valid non-negative number.
experienceMaxInvalid: Maximum experience must be a valid non-negative number.
experienceRangeInvalid: Minimum experience cannot be greater than maximum experience.
jobPostPendingApproval: Your job post is now pending admin approval.
confirmModerateJobPost: Are you sure you want to
hubMyPostsSummary: post(s) created by you. Scroll above in the My Posts section for detailed moderation status.
hubApprovedSummary: approved internal job(s). Use Apply, Save for Later, Track Application, Check Match, and Open Details directly from the cards.
hubNoSavedJobs: No saved jobs yet. Use Save for Later from External Circulars or Approved cards to build your shortlist.
hubNoExternalJobs: No external jobs found with current filters.
trackerSubtitle: Track every application - status, follow-ups, and AI-drafted outreach
trackerClickCardHint: Click any card to expand details and generate AI follow-up drafts
notFoundPortfolioDescription: This public portfolio is unavailable, private, or the username does not exist.
globalErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry, and if the issue persists, refresh the page.
dashboardErrorDescription: Please retry. If this keeps happening, refresh or sign in again.
adminSignInDescription: Sign in with your admin email and password.
signUpCreateAccountHint: Create your account and start growing with AI
signUpTermsAgreement: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
jobsHeroTitle: Create, publish, and track high-potential opportunities
jobsHeroBody: Your Job Hub is now a live operations deck: publish quality roles, monitor approvals, and move your hiring pipeline faster.
postJobHelper: Publish a polished role listing for review. Add the required details first, then the platform handles the approval flow.
professionalListingReviewNotice: Professional listings are reviewed before publishing
publishRoleHint: Open the form to add job details, skills, experience range, and application link.
externalJobsLoadFailed: Failed to load external job circulars.
